channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Stopping a Washington shortcut
item.description: How federal agencies use guidance documents to pressure states, and how some are fighting back.

item.title: J.D. Vance's war on welfare fraud can't pause
item.description: Despite other national priorities, Vice President Vance continues his focus on welfare fraud enforcement.

item.title: Kate O'Beirne, C.S. Lewis, and God's mercy
item.description: Grief remains present even nine years after loss.

item.title: Kansas Republicans let Democrats weaken ballot safeguards
item.description: Voter confidence erodes when legislators fail to defend election rules, critics say.
